title: Silver Style — Full Stack E-Commerce Application
description: Built a full-stack e-commerce application with a scalable architecture using Next.js and TypeScript. Developed RESTful APIs with Express.js and integrated MongoDB for data persistence. Implemented state management using Redux Toolkit and delivered a fully responsive, user-friendly interface with clean UI/UX practices.

title: SAS Project — State Management Demo App
description: Developed a modern frontend application demonstrating lightweight and efficient state management using Zustand. Focused on performance optimization, clean component structure and scalable architecture using Next.js and TypeScript, Ensured full RTL support for Arabic content and built a scalable.

title: First Financials — Corporate Website
description: Developed a responsive corporate website for a financial services company with a clean and professional UI tailored to the industry. Implemented smooth and performant animations using Framer Motion to enhance user experience. Ensured full RTL support for Arabic content and built a scalable, component-based architecture aligned with modern frontend best practices.

title: E-Commerce Backend — Product & Cart Management
description: Created the backend logic for an e-commerce platform, including product management, cart features and order processing. Ensured scalability and security while providing well-documented API endpoints for frontend consumption.

title: Movies API — RESTful Movie Management
description: Built a RESTful API for movie data management, including endpoints for listing, searching and managing movie records. Implemented efficient routing, error handling, and JSON responses for seamless integration with frontend clients.

title: Images API
description: Designed an image handling API to upload, fetch and manage image metadata efficiently. Integrated with Cloudinary for media storage and optimized API endpoints for performance and scalability.

title: Maze Game — Interactive Game
description: Developed an interactive maze game with keyboard controls, collision detection and dynamic obstacles. Focused on providing smooth gameplay and responsive design to ensure accessibility on multiple devices.
